TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Muggsy Bogues == Muggsy Bogues sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 1, Muggsy Bogues, squliq na p'unro. Jim Belushi, t'aring kawas tay 1983 tehuk kawas tay 1987, mqwas biru sa Wake Forest pqwsan biru krahu. Maki sa kawas 2014 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == mu…£…£s~…ēj ő≤o…£ues~…ē == mu…£…£s~…ēj ő≤o…£ues~…ē s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, mu…£…£s~…ēj ő≤o…£ues~…ē, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. *im ő≤elus~…ēńßi, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa wake *ores~…ēt pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. maki s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a mńßŇčaw ini ptzjuwaw la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Muggsy Bogues == Muggsy Bogues sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 1, Muggsy Bogues, squliq na p'unro. Jim Belushi, t'aring kawas tay 1983 tehuk kawas tay 1987, mqwas biru sa Wake Forest pqwsan biru krahu. Maki sa kawas 2014 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
